login.title: Log in
login.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
login.something_went_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
login.verify_email_resent: We sent a new confirmation link to {{email}}.
login.verify_email_instructions: Click the link to activate your account, then log in normally.
login.didnt_receive: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder.

register.title: Create account
register.verify_email_sent: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}.
register.verify_email_instructions: Click the link to activate your account.
register.didnt_receive: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or request a new one below.

forgot_password.title: Recover password
forgot_password.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.sent_message: If that email is registered, you'll receive a password reset link shortly. Also check your spam folder.

reset_password.invalid_link: Invalid link. Please request a new one.
reset_password.title: New password
reset_password.success: Password reset successfully! Redirecting to login...

verify_email.success_message: Your account is active. Redirecting to the lobby...
verify_email.expired_message: The confirmation link expired after 24 hours. Enter your email to receive a new one.
verify_email.resend_sent: New email sent! Check your inbox.
verify_email.used_message: This link has been replaced by a newer one. If your account is already verified, just log in normally.
